title: Part 4 – Exposé : discours lors d'un départ en retraite
instructions: Écoutez le discours, puis répondez aux trois questions.
audioText: Good evening, everyone. Tonight, we're here to celebrate a truly remarkable career. Margaret Chen joined us twenty-three years ago as a junior accountant and worked her way up to become our Chief Financial Officer. Under her leadership, the finance department has grown from a team of five to a department of thirty. Margaret was also instrumental in expanding our operations to three new markets. We will miss her guidance and her calm presence in even the most stressful budget meetings. On behalf of everyone at SolarTech, I would like to present Margaret with this small token of our appreciation. Margaret, we wish you a wonderful and well-deserved retirement.

questions.prompt: What is the occasion for this speech?
questions.explanation: Le speaker dit : "Tonight, we're here to celebrate a truly remarkable career" et conclut en souhaitant une bonne retraite.

questions.prompt: How many years did Margaret Chen work at the company?
questions.explanation: "Margaret Chen joined us twenty-three years ago".

questions.prompt: What was one of Margaret's achievements?
choices: She expanded operations to three new markets
questions.explanation: "Margaret was also instrumental in expanding our operations to three new markets".
